rulings.Case Title: D. P. OCHOA VS. CITY HOUSING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Thursday May 14, 2015. Line 5. DEFENDANT CITY HOUSING, INC.and TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. Demurrer is SUSTAINED based on CCP 430.10(f) as to the 1st (negligence) and 8th (breach of contract) causes of action for P to re-allege his claims contained in therein as separate causes of action. Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to the 3rd cause of action with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts supporting this cause of action not barred by statute of limitations. Demurrer is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the 3rd - 7th and 9th causes of action. Statute of limitations has run. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VERONICA CHAVEZ VS. DANIEL VIELE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Thursday May 14, 2015. Line 6. DEFENDANT DANIEL VIELE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend (paragraphs 32 and 47) to allege facts supporting punitive damages request. Motion is granted without leave to amend as to paragraphs 55-57, punitive damages are not available in breach contract causes of action. Plaintiff shall have a leave to amend to allege a constructive eviction cause of action =(501/REQ)
